message: I'm not sure if this is the right place to ask, but is there a way to set up SSO with Okta? We're evaluating switching our auth provider.
core_issue: The user is inquiring whether SSO can be set up with Okta and mentions evaluating a switch to a new auth provider.
summary: A user has inquired about setting up SSO with Okta as they evaluate switching their authentication provider. This technical question, with a medium priority but low confidence score of 0.6, has been escalated due to classification uncertainty.
